youtube.title: 🏆 BAD → GOOD → EXCELLENT: Best AI Tools 2026
youtube.description:
Stop using the wrong AI tools. Here's the ultimate ranking of the best AI tools in 2026 — from BAD to GOOD to EXCELLENT.

🔊 Text-to-Speech: ElevenLabs vs Qwen 3 vs Gemini 3.1 Flash
🎨 Text-to-Image: DALL-E 3 vs seedream 4.5 vs GPT Image 2
🎬 Text-to-Video: grok imagine video vs happyhorse 1.0 vs seedance 2.0
📹 Image-to-Video: Veo 3.1 vs happyhorse 1.0 vs seedance 2.0
🎙️ Speech-to-Text: SpeechBrain vs Qwen3-ASR vs NVIDIA Canary-Qwen

Which ones are you using? Drop a comment! 👇
